summary: A wildly chaotic concert captured on a solid tape; fans note the energetic atmosphere and a decent recording despite limited technical detail.
review: The show is remembered for its pandemonium – ticketless fans flooding the venue and a tambourine‑passing moment during Cassidy – giving it an unforgettable, wild vibe. The tape itself is praised as “great,” suggesting a listenable sound even though no specific recording details are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gave a high rating (4 stars) praising the tape, while another gave a zero‑star rating with no clear criticism; limited data leads to an average score around the midpoint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience source; one reviewer calls it a “great tape,” implying acceptable clarity and mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlight the chaotic, high‑energy atmosphere—especially the crowded second set—but give little detail on pacing or transitions.
